title: DoraT0-ModPack
description: Build for comfortable survival on vanilla servers.
body:
My mods build is designed for those who want to enjoy a comfortable game on vanilla Minecraft servers.

[**Google drive**](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/10W4N2QFeXkfsuSSoDlNfEfLKdCBrIruM?usp=sharing)

**Build on Fabric!**

Mods: 
- [Better Statistics Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-stats)
- [Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/capes)
- [ClickThrough](https://modrinth.com/mod/clickthrough)
- [Draggable Lists](https://modrinth.com/mod/draggable-lists)
- [Drip Sounds](https://modrinth.com/mod/dripsounds-fabric)
- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling)
- [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves)
- [FastChest](https://modrinth.com/mod/fastchest)
- [Here be no Dragons!](https://modrinth.com/mod/here-be-no-dragons)
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris)
- [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton)
- [LazyDFU](https://modrinth.com/mod/lazydfu)
- [Litematica](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/litematica)
- [Lithium](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithium)
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu)
- [Mouse Wheelie](https://modrinth.com/mod/mouse-wheelie)
- [Plasmo Voice](https://modrinth.com/plugin/plasmo-voice)
- [Resourcify](https://modrinth.com/mod/resourcify)
- [Seamless Loading Screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/seamless-loading-screen)
- [Shulker Box Tooltip](https://modrinth.com/mod/shulkerboxtooltip)
- [SkinShuffle](https://modrinth.com/mod/skinshuffle) (1.20.1)
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)
- [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight)
- [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality)
- [Zoomify](https://modrinth.com/mod/zoomify)
- [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft/versions)
